text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin ◐ from comment #4)

> … IIRC these past crashes were both: 
> 
> a) …
> 
> b) consistently avoidable by not using a particular network service on 
> the FreeBSD side (I can not recall whether the then crashes were with 
> eduroam or with the wired network). 
> 
> This morning's crashes were with eduroam, … 

Crashes were reproducible yesterday and today with wired networking (em0), without eduroam. 

I'll revert, again, to boot environment n264312-789df254cc9e-b and then lock Remmina before an upgrade of other packages.
